rationale: In the introduction, the authors explicitly cite Van Heerde, Leeflang, and Wittink (2000) to explain how earlier disagreement about postpromotion dips was addressed through appropriate time-series estimation. This is not just a generic literature-list mention; it has a concrete framing role in establishing why dynamic effects need careful modeling. The cited study helps justify the problem setup and modeling orientation of the HB-ECM, even though the 2006 paper does not directly reuse that exact model.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Van Heerde et al. (2000) as an important prior result showing that pre- and postpromotion dips can be estimated with time-series methods. That prior evidence underpins the citing paper's motivation to separate immediate and dynamic price effects.
